headline: JPMorgan Athlete Wealth Push Adds New Angle To JPM Valuation Story
summary: JPMorgan Chase has launched a dedicated athlete wealth management initiative targeting sports professionals at all career stages. The bank has also created an Athlete Council that includes Dwyane Wade, Tom Brady, Alex Morgan, and Megan Rapinoe. The move aims to address financial planning and literacy needs in a segment that has expanded since NCAA rule changes on athlete compensation. For investors watching NYSE:JPM, this new push into athlete-focused wealth management comes as the stock...

headline: Korea Zinc Seeks $2 Billion Loan for US Critical Minerals Plant
summary: JPMorgan Chase & Co. is the sole mandated lead arranger and underwriter of the five-year loan, the people said, who asked not to be identified discussing private matters.  A Korea Zinc spokesperson said “the fundraising is proceeding smoothly” and that the project will contribute to “strengthening economic and security cooperation between South Korea and the US, as well as diversifying the global supply chain.”  A representative for JPMorgan declined to comment.

content.title: Korea Zinc Seeks $2 Billion Loan for US Critical Minerals Plant
content.summary: JPMorgan Chase & Co. is the sole mandated lead arranger and underwriter of the five-year loan, the people said, who asked not to be identified discussing private matters.  A Korea Zinc spokesperson said “the fundraising is proceeding smoothly” and that the project will contribute to “strengthening economic and security cooperation between South Korea and the US, as well as diversifying the global supply chain.”  A representative for JPMorgan declined to comment.

headline: How The Babcock International Group (LSE:BAB) Story Is Shifting With Mixed Analyst Views
summary: The blended fair value for Babcock International Group is held at £15.46 per share, even as some individual price targets, such as a move to £16.70 from £14.40, shift around it. That stability reflects a tug of war between bullish research, including recent target lifts from banks like JPMorgan and Deutsche Bank, and more cautious analysts trimming expectations on execution risk. As you read on, you will see how these competing views shape the evolving narrative and what that might mean for...

As you read on, you will see how these competing views shape the evolving narrative and what that might mean for...

headline: JPMorgan Strategists Say Investors Are Complacent on Iran War
summary: The team, led by Dubravko Lakos-Bujas, said investors are failing to price the potential economic damage from soaring energy costs, despite the fact that four out of five oil shocks since the 1970s have led to recession.  “While some of the froth has been taken out of high-risk factors and speculative areas of the market, we still see complacency,” the strategists said in a note.

content.title: JPMorgan Strategists Say Investors Are Complacent on Iran War
content.summary: The team, led by Dubravko Lakos-Bujas, said investors are failing to price the potential economic damage from soaring energy costs, despite the fact that four out of five oil shocks since the 1970s have led to recession.  “While some of the froth has been taken out of high-risk factors and speculative areas of the market, we still see complacency,” the strategists said in a note.

headline: Fed proposes easing capital rules for major banks
summary: The Federal Reserve has unveiled new proposals to ease capital rules for major banks. Yahoo Finance Senior Fed Reporter Jennifer Schonberger comes on the program to highlight the new banking regulation proposals under the Basel III Endgame guidelines.

headline: Chase Returns to Pacific Palisades One Year After Wildfire
summary: PACIFIC PALISADES, Calif., March 19, 2026--Chase today opened its new Pacific Palisades branch nearly a year after the 2025 Southern California wildfires destroyed the previous location. The 5,500‑plus‑square‑foot space offers a larger, modern environment designed for convenience, accessibility and community engagement.

content.title: Chase Returns to Pacific Palisades One Year After Wildfire

The 5,500‑plus‑square‑foot space offers a larger, modern environment designed for convenience, accessibility and community engagement.

headline: Market Madness: Why JPMorgan, McDonald's are slam dunk stock picks
summary: Tipping off Yahoo Finance's "Market Madness" bracket tournament, Winthrop Capital CIO Adam Coons joins Julie Hyman to make the case for the first round of corporate match-ups, which includes JPMorgan Chase (JPM) vs. TJX (TJX) and McDonald's (MCD) vs. Disney (DIS).

headline: Fed Keeps Rates Steady Amid Rising Inflation: What it Means for Banks
summary: JPM, BAC, C, WFC & KEY slide as the Fed holds rates at 3.5-3.75% and flags higher inflation, signaling a tough near-term outlook for banks' financial performance.

headline: J.P. Morgan Debuts Equity Premium Yield ETFs ROCY and ROCQ on Nasdaq
summary: J.P. Morgan Asset Management today announced the launch of two new active ETFs on the Nasdaq Exchange as part of the firm's landmark derivative income suite, the JPMorgan Equity Premium Yield ETF (ROCY) and the JPMorgan Nasdaq Equity Premium Yield ETF (ROCQ).

headline: New bank capital requirements, Five Below surges over Q4 holiday results
summary: Yahoo Finance Host Josh Lipton tracks today's top moving stocks and biggest market stories in this Market Minute: As strikes on power facilities in the Middle East intensify, Wall Street sees renewed concerns around inflation and dampening hope for interest rate cuts. A proposal to lower bank capital requirements has large bank stocks like JPMorgan Chase (JPM) and Bank of America (BAC) ticking slightly lower in Thursday's session. Five Below (FIVE) shares surge following a successful Q4 holiday season.

content.title: New bank capital requirements, Five Below surges over Q4 holiday results
content.description:
Yahoo Finance Host Josh Lipton tracks today's top moving stocks and biggest market stories in this Market Minute:

As strikes on power facilities in the Middle East intensify, Wall Street sees renewed concerns around inflation and dampening hope for interest rate cuts.

A proposal to lower bank capital requirements has large bank stocks like JPMorgan Chase (JPM) and Bank of America (BAC) ticking slightly lower in Thursday's session.

Five Below (FIVE) shares surge following a successful Q4 holiday season.
content.summary: Yahoo Finance Host Josh Lipton tracks today's top moving stocks and biggest market stories in this Market Minute: As strikes on power facilities in the Middle East intensify, Wall Street sees renewed concerns around inflation and dampening hope for interest rate cuts. A proposal to lower bank capital requirements has large bank stocks like JPMorgan Chase (JPM) and Bank of America (BAC) ticking slightly lower in Thursday's session. Five Below (FIVE) shares surge following a successful Q4 holiday season.
